description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pembrolizumab (200mg and 400mg) for reimbursement as a first-line treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) or mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) colorectal cancer (CRC).

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
